name: @eqlcc/analytics
description: Projection writers and the analytics read/query API for EQL Command Center: the deterministic, rebuildable pipeline that turns the append-only events table into sessions/zones/encounters/rollups and the thin typed read API the UI consumes (issue #20, docs/PROJECTIONS_SPEC.md). Pure TS; depends on @eqlcc/database, @eqlcc/log-parser, @eqlcc/event-schema.
